title: Glasses Girl Mari speculation discussion
wikitext:
[]: "Glasses Girl" (Mari) speculation/discussion Post by Szmitten » Fri Sep 07, 2007 6:36 am Just a new schoolfriend a la Touji/Kensuke? A new pilot? Shinji's love interest? A human angel? A human like Rei/Kaworu who's carrying the soul of a Seed of Life/this new third Angel? Keels'/Fuyutsuki's daughter/grandaughter? Asuka's/Shinji's/Touji's/Misato's sister? A robot in disguise? Discuss.

[]: Re: New character speculation/discussion Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Sep 07, 2007 6:47 am Szmitten wrote: Shinji's love interest?

[]: Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 07, 2007 7:39 am I think Shinji's harem is big enough. She'll problay be the pilot of the ill fated unit four disaster.

[]: Re: New character speculation/discussion Post by THE Hal E. Burton 9000 » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:23 am the_seventh_child wrote: Szmitten wrote: Shinji's love interest ?

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:28 am Just saw this image today on the Eva ML: http://www.evamonkey.com/randomimages/h ... w_girl.jpg Gainax and NewType are a bunch of dicks.

[]: Post by Yasha » Fri Sep 07, 2007 8:43 am Am I the only one who new girls' uniform reminds of Mahou Sensei Negima's Mahora uniforms? :? The Eva Monkey wrote: Gainax and NewType are a bunch of dicks.

[]: Post by TriLink » Fri Sep 07, 2007 10:12 am *SIGH* Do we really need another girl for Shinji to accidentally see naked in Eva? Anno's getting a little redundant in that regard.

[]: Re: New character speculation/discussion Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 07, 2007 10:30 am The girl in EM's post looks cool. I hope she's either a SEELE spy or Misato's sister. Either two of those would be pretty awesome. She is talking to Asuka in that picture, though - so she could have something to do with Asuka. If she turns out to be another love interest for Shinji, I think I'll be disapointed! the_seventh_child wrote:

[]: Post by Sandoz » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:05 am I also have to say "Please God no" in regards to New Girl being Shinji's love interest. Judging from the different uniform she's not one of the pilot candidates from Class 2-A. My guess is that she'll be an international student, not related to any of the other characters, and will be shipped along with one of the Evas. I like the idea of her being the doomed pilot of Eva-04. (This is Eva; we know something terrible is going to happen to her, it's just a matter of what it is.) Kaworu's proof that you need only ten minutes of screentime to be a highly marketable Eva character.

[]: Post by Gendo'sPapa » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:16 am She's a new pilot. Accept it. Becoming an Eva pilot is immediate financial gold for Gainax because people love them Eva pilots. Especially with underage breasts. Also, it doesnt make anything official but that image with her headless body is showing only Eva pilots. She's a pilot. Shinji at some point will probably interact with her in some goofy fan-service way (the dance against Israfel becomes a three person dance with Shinji hopping between two girls and letting mucho double time fan-service). The question isn't what she adds as a pilot (I approve of her being there because a new pilot and Eva present means Part 2 can't just be more sexier animated Eva remakes, scenarios will have to be rewritten and made NEW), the question is what she adds as a character. Proabably on the surface she'll seem like the most normal of the pilots but deep down she'll have suffered some traumatic parent based horror in her childhood.

[]: Post by chee » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:21 am I hope she ends up being a total psycho. Not the funny kind, either. The Frank Booth kind.

[]: Post by CitizenGeek » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:24 am What if this character is actually a ... happy, mentally healthy girl? It's likely that's she's moved from another country, so maybe she becomes friends with the pilots by chance and she's actually fun and stuff? I know - This is Eva: happiness is not allowed - but it's a nice thought! Sandoz wrote: Kaworu's proof that you need only ten minutes of screentime to be a highly marketable Eva character.

[]: Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:26 am Gendo'sPapa wrote: She's a new pilot. Accept it. Becoming an Eva pilot is immediate financial gold for Gainax because people love them Eva pilots. Especially with underage breasts.

[]: Post by Ayana-Me » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:29 am So basically + 2 years = new girl

[]: Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 07, 2007 11:31 am I see another dark haired girl in my magic 8-ball. Maybe British or something.

[]: Post by CorporalChaos » Fri Sep 07, 2007 12:51 pm chee wrote: I hope she ends up being a total psycho. Not the funny kind, either. The Frank Booth kind.

[]: Post by DatDude » Fri Sep 07, 2007 12:57 pm The noobie has to be disturbed or she wouldnt be an eva character

[]: Post by TriLink » Fri Sep 07, 2007 1:05 pm Truer words have never been spoken.

[]: Post by The Eva Monkey » Fri Sep 07, 2007 2:03 pm Maybe she'll be so normal and socially adjusted that she'll be a total weirdo by contrast. "She's so mild mannered... WEIRD! WEIRD DESUUUU!"

[]: Post by the_seventh_child » Fri Sep 07, 2007 2:06 pm CitizenGeek wrote: What if this character is actually a ... happy, mentally healthy girl?
